title: spyridium stenophyllum subsp. stenophyllum
intro: Spyridium stenophyllum subsp. stenophyllum, also known as Stenogyne, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rhamnaceae, native to Western Australia. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it beneficial for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Spyridium stenophyllum subsp. stenophyllum include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
